description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging both foundational and advanced skills through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a supportive, encouraging tone that nudges learners to consider CSS as a résumé‑worthy skill. The quiz aims to boost confidence while highlighting areas for further study.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling, Best practices and performance
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students who already know basic CSS and want to evaluate and deepen their modern CSS expertise.
